itemName.en: Accuracy International AXMC .338 LM bolt-action sniper rifle

description.zh:
又要考验你的本事了，士兵！这次你可要做好充分准备。让我看看你对 .338 Lapua Magnum 口径的武器掌握得如何。
这种武器威力巨大，被它击中可不是闹着玩的。不过，你还不知道具体任务是什么吧？那就仔细听好了。

你的主要目标是使用 .338 口径步枪干掉几个目标，而且必须搭配 30 毫米或 34 毫米的瞄准镜来完成。另一个目标是从 250 米或更远的距离击毙几个人，这部分不需要瞄准镜。你知道该怎么做了吧？很好，完成任务后记得向我汇报。祝你好运！
description.en:
About to test your skills again? You better prepare soldier! Show me how good you with weapons chambered in .338 Lapua Magnum.
These weapons are very very powerful, you surely don't want to get hit by these. Anyway, to your task, you don't know what your job is yet, so listen carefully.

Your main objective is to get rid of a few targets with .338 rifles, and you have to use a 30mm or 34mm scope while doing it. Your other objective is to take out a few people from two hundred fifty meters or more, no scope requirements for this part. You know what to do, yeah? Good, report back to me when you took care of it, good luck out there.
